name: hate-speech-detection-platform
description: Explainable multilingual hate speech detection platform with React, Express, MongoDB, and Flask.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && python -m pip install -r ml-service/requirements.txt
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:ml
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run build
